idea-plugin.name: SQL Select Generator
idea-plugin.description:
SQL Select Generator

A simple and efficient IntelliJ IDEA plugin for generating SELECT SQL statements from database tables.

Features:

  • Right-click on any database table to generate SELECT statement
  • Select/deselect specific columns with a user-friendly checkbox interface
  • Optional table alias support
  • One-click copy generated SQL to clipboard
  • Real-time SQL preview

How to use:

  1. Open Database tool window in IntelliJ IDEA
  2. Right-click on any table
  3. Select "Generate SELECT Statement"
  4. Choose columns and optional alias
  5. Copy or insert the generated SQL
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Support for generating SELECT statements from database tables
  • Column selection with checkboxes
  • Table alias support
  • One-click copy functionality

action.description: Generate SELECT SQL statement for selected table
